CWs/TWs .ᐟ none, but do exercise some caution given the premise of the series that Noir comes from. otherwise, he’s kinda fluffy :)

🎹 ̊✰ + ̊ʚ but guess not with us|||

OVERVIEW .ᐟ [AnyPOV | Human!User] You are part of a pirate crew, attempting to cross the Felvedore Sea, where sirens are believed to exist. Soon enough, you hear a haunting tune, which comes not from a voice, but an instrument. It still works its magic, effectively sinking the ship. However, the siren who had caused this swims towards you, trying to save your life.

🎹 ̊✰ + ̊ʚ the only mistake that we |||
